creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 201183
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.6.1

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to 2.6.1, which is a minor bug fix release.

    [BUGFIX] Azure SD: Fix discovery getting stuck sometimes.
    [BUGFIX] Marathon SD: Use Tasks.Ports when RequirePorts is false.
    [BUGFIX] Promtool: Fix "out-of-order sample" errors when testing rules.

-David
